channel.title: AI Agents on Jorge Prado - AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in AI Agents on Jorge Prado - AI Engineer

item.title: AI Voice Agent Framework
item.description: End-to-end framework for building conversational AI agents with voice I/O, integrating speech-to-text, LLM reasoning, and text-to-speech synthesis.

item.title: Building AI Agents with Model Context Protocol
item.description:
The Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables AI agents to dynamically access tools and data sources while maintaining stateless, scalable architectures. Learn how to design MCP-compatible agents and integrate them with popular LLM frameworks.

This article explores:

  • MCP specification and protocol design
  • Implementing custom MCP servers
  • Integration with Claude and other LLMs
  • Production deployment considerations
